x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Financial / Capital Product Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Definition: A formal agreement where the bank provides funding, lending, or investment capabilities to a partner, defining financial terms, repayment, revenue sharing, and risk allocation.

Includes:
Loans / Credit Lines Agreement
Treasury & Liquidity Services Agreement
Trade Finance Agreement
Investment Products Agreement
Capital Contributions Agreement (for JV participation)

Comment
Example:
SME Loan Agreement: A bank provides a $5M credit line to a fintech lending platform to distribute to small businesses. The agreement specifies interest rates, revenue share, repayment schedule, and risk responsibilities.

Trade Finance Agreement: Bank and importer partner agree on letters of credit terms for cross-border shipments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Payments & Transaction Service Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An agreement where the bank enables the partner to access its payment infrastructure or issue cards, specifying operational procedures, revenue sharing, and compliance obligations.

Includes:
Payment Processing Agreement
Card Issuing Agreement
Digital Wallet / eWallet Agreement
Cross-border / FX Payments Agreement
Embedded Payment APIs Agreement

Comment:
Example:
Co-branded Card Agreement: A retail chain partners with the bank to issue a co-branded credit card. The agreement defines card fees, cashback rates, processing responsibilities, and marketing rules.

API Access Agreement: A ride-sharing platform integrates the banks API to offer in-app wallets and driver payouts.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Insurance / Risk Product Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An agreement governing the distribution of insurance products or risk services via the partner, detailing commissions, regulatory responsibilities, and operational roles.

Includes:
Life / Health Insurance Agreement
Motor / Property Insurance Agreement
Credit Protection Insurance Agreement
Risk & Compliance Solutions Agreement

Comment:
Example:
Bancassurance Life Policy Agreement: Bank sells life insurance from an insurance company. The agreement specifies commissions, training requirements, KYC responsibilities, and customer service obligations.

AML Monitoring Service Agreement: A fintech uses the banks AML service; the agreement covers scope, reporting, and liabilities.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Technology & Operational Service Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An agreement where the bank provides operational systems, APIs, or technical support to partners, outlining service levels, access rights, and integration responsibilities.

Includes:
Core Banking Access / API Agreement
IT / Cloud Infrastructure Agreement
Fraud Detection & Cybersecurity Agreement
Operational Support Agreement

Comment:
Example:
API Banking Agreement: A fintech integrates the banks account opening API. The agreement covers uptime SLA (99.9%), security standards, and support processes.

Cloud Hosting Agreement: Bank hosts a partners co-branded banking app; agreement defines storage, backup, security, and SLA terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner Strategic / Collaborative Product Agreement
x-enumeration-literals.description:
An agreement defining long-term, high-value collaboration where the bank and partner co-create products, share risk, and integrate governance and operations.

Includes:
Banking-as-a-Service (BaaS) Agreement
Joint Venture Agreement
Co-branded Products Agreement
Innovation / R&D Support Agreement

Comment:
Example:
Joint Venture Agreement: Bank and fintech create a digital bank JV. Agreement defines ownership (50/50), capital contributions, board composition, profit-sharing, and regulatory responsibilities.

Co-branded Loan Product Agreement: Bank and retailer co-create a point-of-sale financing product; agreement covers pricing, risk allocation, and marketing responsibilities.
